agent_readable_rule: With tip tracking enabled, picking up from a spot that has no tip raises NoTipError. A dry-run world should model tip inventory explicitly and reject the action.

message_shape.message: Tip spot does not have a tip.

agent_readable_rule: With tip tracking enabled, picking up while a channel already has a tip or dropping into an occupied tip spot raises HasTipError. A dry-run world should keep channel and tip-spot state separate.

messages: Tip spot already has a tip.

agent_readable_rule: With volume tracking enabled, dispensing more liquid than the tip currently contains raises TooLittleLiquidError. A dry-run world should update tip volume on aspirate and dispense.

message_shape.message: Not enough liquid in container: requested_uL > available_uL.

agent_readable_rule: With volume tracking enabled, aspirating more liquid than the tip has free volume for raises TooLittleVolumeError. A dry-run world should enforce tip capacity.

message_shape.message: Not enough free volume in container: requested_uL > free_volume_uL.

agent_readable_rule: PyLabRobot supports hardware backends and real lab automation equipment, but this source pack selects Chatterbox and simulator semantics only. Do not connect to real devices, serial ports, robot hosts, pumps, scales, readers, or other hardware from this pack.
